rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. asymmetric shape; 2. irregular/atypical pigment network; 3. multiple brown shades with darker eccentric focus; 4. peripheral network disruption
rules.rationale: The model likely misinterpreted the irregular pigment network and asymmetric pigmentation as a benign atypical nevus rather than recognizing the malignant features.
rules.description: Elicited from ISIC_0024410: irregular pigment network with abrupt cutoff at periphery

rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. irregular brown-gray granular pigmentation; 2. white scar-like regression areas; 3. asymmetric distribution of pigment; 4. loss of typical nevus network
rules.rationale: The model likely misinterpreted the irregular brown pigmentation and regression features as benign nevus patterns rather than recognizing the asymmetric pigment network and gray-white regression areas indicative of melanoma.
rules.description: Elicited from ISIC_0024647: asymmetric annular-granular pattern with peppering regressio

rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. small pigmented lesion with central clearing or gray-white regression; 2. asymmetric peripheral pigment distribution; 3. irregular brown pigment at margins
rules.rationale: The model likely interpreted the small size and relatively regular border as benign features, missing the subtle irregular pigment distribution and central regression.
rules.description: Elicited from ISIC_0024911: central hypopigmentation/regression with peripheral pigment

rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. asymmetric pigment distribution; 2. multiple brown hues present; 3. irregular border with fading edges; 4. focal dark globules or dots
rules.rationale: The model likely interpreted the irregular pigmentation as benign nevus variation rather than recognizing the asymmetric distribution and multiple brown shades as melanoma features.
rules.description: Elicited from ISIC_0025128: irregular pigment network with multiple shades of brown and
